articles.title: Vault: House Ag’s prediction market worries
articles.summary: The House Agriculture Committee is raising concerns about prediction markets, likely viewing them as a threat to traditional agricultural futures or worried about their regulatory oversight. If Congress starts targeting prediction markets with restrictive legislation, it could severely limit where Americans can legally bet on political outcomes and other events.

articles.title: Trump-appointed official vows to investigate insider trading on prediction markets
articles.summary: A Trump-appointed official has announced plans to probe potential insider trading activity on prediction markets. This signals regulatory scrutiny is coming to an industry that's operated mostly in the shadows, which could mean stricter oversight but also legitimacy for platforms that play by the rules.

articles.title: NBA Is in Talks With Kalshi and Polymarket
articles.summary: The NBA is reportedly negotiating partnerships with prediction market platforms Kalshi and Polymarket to expand betting opportunities beyond traditional sportsbooks. This marks a major legitimacy boost for crypto-native and CFTC-regulated prediction markets, potentially opening the floodgates for other major sports leagues to embrace prediction trading over traditional gambling.

articles.title: Tribal gaming leaders denounce prediction markets ahead of House Committee hearing on Kalshi
articles.summary: Tribal gaming leaders are pushing back against prediction markets before a House Committee hearing on Kalshi, likely arguing that political betting threatens their casino monopolies. This opposition could influence lawmakers to impose stricter regulations on prediction markets, potentially limiting what Americans can bet on beyond just elections.

articles.title: A Smooth Succession at the Fed? Prediction Markets Are Increasingly Doubtful
articles.summary: Prediction markets are showing growing skepticism that Jerome Powell's eventual departure from the Federal Reserve will go smoothly, suggesting traders expect political drama or market volatility when leadership changes hands. The shift matters because Fed succession battles can create massive trading opportunities across interest rate futures, currency markets, and broader economic bets as uncertainty spikes.

articles.title: A Polymarket trader made $300,000 betting on Biden's pardons, a new analysis shows
articles.summary: A trader on Polymarket scored $300,000 by correctly predicting which pardons President Biden would issue, according to new analysis of the platform's betting data. The windfall shows how political prediction markets are expanding beyond elections into granular executive decisions, creating fresh profit opportunities for bettors willing to track presidential patterns.

articles.title: Prediction markets take a surprising turn from polls for OK governor's race
articles.summary: Prediction markets are diverging from traditional polling data in Oklahoma's gubernatorial race, suggesting bettors see different odds than what surveys indicate. This split signals either a major polling miss or smart money spotting something the surveys can't capture, making it a key test of whether markets truly outperform polls in predictive accuracy.

articles.title: Kalshi Wants Your ID Whether You Gamble or Not (You Know, for Kids)
articles.summary: Kalshi is apparently collecting identification from users regardless of whether they actually place bets, suggesting the platform is casting a wide net for user verification and data collection. This signals either aggressive compliance ahead of regulatory scrutiny or a broader strategy to build user profiles before monetizing non-gambling features, both of which could reshape how prediction markets handle customer onboarding.

articles.title: The Newest Prediction Markets Guru Is a Middle Schooler in Braces
articles.summary: A middle school kid with braces is apparently crushing it on prediction markets and gaining a following as a forecasting expert. This matters because if a 13-year-old can outpredict adults with decades of experience, it either proves the markets are broken or that raw analytical thinking beats conventional wisdom.

articles.title: Kalshi's not having a good time in Ohio
articles.summary: Kalshi is facing regulatory pushback or legal troubles in Ohio that's disrupting their operations in the state. This signals growing scrutiny of prediction markets at the state level, which could create a patchwork of regulations that makes expansion harder for platforms trying to go mainstream.

articles.title: Rahm Emanuel proposes betting and prediction markets tax, defends CPS reforms as he mulls presidential bid
articles.summary: Rahm Emanuel is floating a betting and prediction markets tax while defending his Chicago Public Schools record as he considers jumping into the 2028 presidential race. A prediction markets tax from a potential Democratic frontrunner signals the party's growing appetite for regulating the space, especially after betting markets called Trump's victory before traditional polls.

articles.title: The investors profiting from prediction markets? The top 1%, of course
articles.summary: A new analysis reveals that the top 1% of prediction market traders are capturing the lion's share of profits, mirroring wealth concentration patterns across traditional finance. This concentration could undermine the democratic promise of prediction markets while creating liquidity concerns as casual bettors get squeezed out by sophisticated players.
